name: RACI Matrix
what_it_is: Responsibility assignment - Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, Informed - clarifying who does what in multi-stakeholder execution.
core_mechanic: Tasks as rows, stakeholders as columns. R (does the work), A (owns outcome - only one per row), C (input before), I (notified after). Flag rows with no A or too many R's.
when_to_use: Cross-functional work where ownership is ambiguous / Execution is stalling and you suspect coordination not capability problems / Post-mortem reveals "we thought someone else was handling it"
when_not_to_use: Solo work / Early-stage exploration / As a substitute for the alignment conversation itself
ideaos_application: Agent 3 builds lightweight RACI for top 5-7 workstreams, names key stakeholders, flags any rows with missing accountability or over-distributed responsibility.
